title: epipactis helleborine var. intrusa
intro: Epipactis helleborine var. intrusa is a variety of the Helleborine orchid, a type of terrestrial orchid native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Epipactis helleborine var. intrusa include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are typically used to treat a variety of ailments, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
